rationale.fidelity: Preserves known-job assignment, certification and hours constraints, deterministic model scope, and total scheduled job value.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains the morning trigger, scarce qualified-hour opportunity cost, and feasible assignment counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Makes no unjustified contribution claim but supplies no literature-based positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly treats emergency materiality as unsupported and rejects robustness or optimality claims beyond modeled jobs.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and accessible with only minor repetition between mapping and gates.
rationale.overall: A faithful and disciplined assignment framing that directly addresses the emergency-scope trap.
